findings.basis_detail: Additional operational context is needed to select a safe disposition for an existing destination when overwrite is not requested.

fs_copy_dest_exists_no_overwrite.governing_rationale: A deterministic rule-gap is present for destination-exists-no-overwrite; this structural deficiency governs immediate disposition.

disposition.structural_change_needed: Define explicit FS_COPY destination-exists-no-overwrite disposition rule.

structural_signals.description: No explicit deterministic disposition exists for FS_COPY when destination exists and overwrite is not requested.
